item.title: Three healthy one-pan family dinners making dinner (and clean up) easier
item.description: Less mess, more flavour. These nutritious one-pan dinners are perfect for busy weeknights.

item.title: Record low? Not on our watch, say Wallabies
item.description: ‘We’re on the cusp of being a really good team.’

item.title: Middle East latest: Iran threatens to halt all Mideast energy exports after US reimposes its blockade on Iran
item.description: The threats from Tehran came as the US intensified its airstrike campaign on Wednesday, pushing the region back towards all-out war.

item.title: TikToker allegedly steals groceries from supermarkets and cooks them for online clicks
item.description: The man allegedly steals hundreds of dollars in groceries and cooks them up for his followers.

item.title: Federal government scrambles to reassure Australians over plan to increase pesticides on berries at farms
item.description: The farming chemicals regulator claims the pesticide levels would be safe despite critics raising doubts.

item.title: ‘It doesn’t make sense’: Como resident told to pay up to remove disused Telstra box on council-owned verge
item.description: A Como resident has been told he will need to pay if he wants an old disconnected Telstra box on his verge removed, even though he doesn’t own the equipment or the land.

item.title: US bombards Iran for fifth day as Iranian leaders say negotiations off the table
item.description: Hostilities are keeping ships from passing through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Grim details emerge after woman found dead in Rockhampton CBD
item.description: The homicide squad has been called in to probe the 32-year-old’s death.

item.title: Sam Neill’s cause of death revealed as pneumonia by his longtime agent
item.description: The beloved actor died earlier this week in a Sydney hospital with his family revealing the loss was ‘sudden and unexpected’.

item.title: Nutritionist reveals the foods that naturally boost GLP-1
item.description: As diabetes rates climb, nutritionist Sarah Di Lorenzo shares the foods she says can help support prevention and blood sugar control.

item.title: More than 500 feared dead after two boats carrying refugees sink off Myanmar
item.description: Refugees are continuing to make perilous maritime journeys in search of safety and better opportunities.

item.title: PM urged to keep politics out of Australians’ super after calling $4.5 trillion pool a national asset
item.description: ‘Don’t touch the super complex, don’t direct it, don’t tell it where to go.’

item.title: Cyclist rushed to hospital after eastern brown snake trapped in bike chain bites rider in Burringbar
item.description: Her last day on holidays took a dangerous turn on a popular rail trail.

item.title: South Australian MP Tony Pasin injured and staffer hospitalised after Tasmanian oyster tour hits a sandbar
item.description: The South Australian politician had been touring an oyster farm in Tasmania when the incident unfolded.

item.title: Fresh plea as US search for missing Melbourne woman Sally Contarino nears one-month mark
item.description: The 26-year-old never boarded her planned flight home after a solo trip to the US.

item.title: University of Queensland researchers trial neck exercises to prevent debilitating migraines
item.description: Millions of migraine sufferers could soon find relief from an unexpected place.

item.title: US marine biologist Kent Carpenter’s murder suspects held in Philippines
item.description: The scientist was allegedly shot in the head while he sat on a sofa.

item.title: ‘I knew I’d end up on the news’: Domestic violence survivor’s warning as Australia confronts another week of alleged killings
item.description: ‘I might as well have had a collar and a lead on. He took my bank cards, my phone, wiped my social media. From then on, I basically needed permission to breathe.’

item.title: Are Grammy nominees for Best New Artist industry plants?
item.description: The move has reignited fierce debate about what it means to be a breakthrough artist and why so many musicians are being accused of manufactured success.

item.title: Parents of teen poisoned in Laos ‘crushed’ over lack of justice as government steps in
item.description: ‘I don’t even think devastated is a strong enough word.’

item.title: Madeleine West: Former Neighbours actor calls out man who rudely swore at her while shopping at Woolworths
item.description: ‘I almost said something, but realised my time was too precious to be wasted on an oxygen-thief like yourself.’

item.title: Telstra finally pinpoint cause of crippling nationwide network outage
item.description: The finger is being pointed at the telco giant’s servers in Melbourne, uncovered after days of investigation.

item.title: Donald Trump accuses China of election interference in primetime address
item.description: The US president used the remarks to justify his push to pass a strict voter ID bill in Congress.

item.title: Waitress axing: Natalie Bassingthwaighte says goodbye to theatre days before musical ends run early
item.description: The announcement comes as Waitress prepares to end its run early after axing.

item.title: Luxury cars among $125 million in alleged criminal assets seized by SA Police under confiscation law reforms
item.description: ‘No one should be driving a Lamborghini ... funded by crimes that hurt South Australians.’

item.title: Lance Thompson’s daughter reveals in exclusive interview what claimed the NRL star’s life
item.description: For almost eight years, Lance Thompson’s death was publicly described as a medical episode.

item.title: Wok the Duck owners devastated after South Australian government earmarks site for demolition
item.description: The owners were only given 24 hours’ notice before the state government announced the decision.

item.title: Younger Australians turning to reverse mortgages to fund early retirement
item.description: They're ditching the downsizing dream and unlocking their home's hidden wealth.

item.title: Family provide update on toddler allegedly thrown into UK’s Johnsons of Old Hurst zoo crocodile enclosure
item.description: Loved ones have released a new statement following the boy’s seventh surgery.

item.title: Oscar-winning Irish actor Brenda Fricker dies aged 81
item.description: She is best known for her performances in the films My Left Foot and Home Alone 2.

item.title: Connor Murphy: The truth about gold injections, why doctors used them and why experts warn against it
item.description: Claims of ‘superpowers’ have revived questions about gold’s surprising role in medicine.

item.title: West Indies cricket legend Sir Garfield Sobers dies aged 89
item.description: ‘There are champions ... then there are those rare individuals who redefine the meaning of greatness.’

item.title: Australian golfer Lucas Herbert leads British Open and in it to win it
item.description: The 30-year-old is now facing the biggest weekend of his life and admits he’s feeling anxious.

item.title: Bad memories: Wallabies on alert for Italy clash
item.description: Australia have lost twice in a row to Italy, but the Wallabies are vowing to make amends in Perth in a bid to farewell coach Joe Schmidt in style.

item.title: Smartraveller warns Australians to exercise ‘high degree of caution’ in Laos after shock alcohol poisoning punishments
item.description: Australian teenagers Bianca Jones and Holly Morton-Bowles died after consuming a deadly batch of alcohol in 2024.

item.title: On-the-spot fine for controversial camping in Noosa carparks hiked up to $345
item.description: The punishment costs about as much as a week of legal, unpowered camping.

item.title: Cricket world reacts to death of much-loved icon Sir Garfield Sobers
item.description: ‘He didn’t say anything. He did not need to. There was no ego. His walk let the opposition know he was there for business.’

item.title: Golf superstar Bryson DeChambeau to play on in British Open despite fury over rule breach: ‘Don’t agree with it’
item.description: The 32-year-old has addressed reports that he might quit the tournament after being penalised for a serious rule breach.

item.title: Hooded immigration officers pin Australian to the ground in dramatic arrest at Las Vegas Airport
item.description: A statement from the immigration agency said they abandoned the arrest when ‘a crowd of anti-ICE agitators surrounded officers’.

item.description: The CEO of Master Builders Australia has broken her silence on 7NEWS’ The Issue on the harrowing time she was targeted at her private home.

item.description: Heavy smoke has blanketed much of the nation with the president kicking off a bitter war of words over ‘willful negligence’.

item.description: Images created by artificial intelligence are harder to detect than many believe. Here is what you need to look out for.

item.description: The referee dished out a red card as the Aussies’ second-worst coaching tenure ended on a high.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Young woman dies of critical burn injuries after huge fire rips though Sunshine Coast unit
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Verdict in as Justin Bieber’s ‘haunting song’ brings down World Cup half-time show
item.description: The Super Bowl-style performance took over the final but one superstar ‘completely killed the mood’.

item.title: Bobby Hill begins talks with Collingwood over ending contract
item.description: The Norm Smith medallist is open to continuing his career at another club.

item.title: World Cup final ends on sour note as Leandro Paredes sparks fracas after altercation with Eric García
item.description: ‘He threw two or three haymakers into someone’s face. There is no place or space for that.’

item.title: Tears flow for Lionel Messi in sad final image after World Cup loss to Spain
item.description: The 39-year-old superstar was an emotional wreck as Argentina fans sung his name one last time.

item.title: Donald Trump lingers to stay in Spain’s World Cup famous trophy shot
item.description: A hot-mic moment said it all after FIFA president Gianni Infantino failed to intervene in time.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife’s Yvonne leaves before Jarrad reveals final choice Brodie
item.description: ‘It felt more strategic.’

item.title: US and Iran intensify attacks as Israel warns missile fire could spill over
item.description: An interim ceasefire deal has further unravelled as strikes rock multiple countries.

item.title: 2026 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 prices: Modest rise for increased payload
item.description: You can legally carry more in a Chevrolet Silverado 1500 than before thanks to a payload upgrade, which has also helped GM sidestep some local regulations.

item.title: Hyundai Tucson recalled
item.description: A total of 2650 Hyundai Tucson SUVs built in 2025 may have sensors that prevent the side airbags from deploying properly.

item.title: ‘Human headline’ Derryn Hinch farewelled at religion-free state funeral
item.description: ‘I’ve loved you from the very start to the very end,’ she said at his funeral on Monday.

item.title: Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni ends press conference in tears after World Cup final: ‘I’m sorry’
item.description: Lionel Scaloni could not hold it back when one question triggered a lot of emotion.

item.title: WHO says almost half of dementia cases ‘preventable’ with new health guidelines
item.description: ‘These recommendations offer real-life actions that will reduce dementia risk.’

item.title: Papua New Guinea spotted at airport with rugby union code-swapper Joey Manu
item.description: Joey Manu has been out of the NRL since 2024 but a shock return could be on the cards.

item.title: 2026 Renault Arkana price and specs: Small SUV gets mild-hybrid power
item.description: The Renault Arkana now has a mild-hybrid system, but with no appreciable benefit in fuel consumption or CO2 emissions.

item.title: Toyota executive wants all Japanese automakers to collaborate amid China's rise
item.description: Toyota's former CEO, and now head of Japan's association of automakers, is pushing for the country to work together to counter the threat of Chinese marques.

item.title: New Tasmania Devils coach Ken Hinkley had given up before winning Port Adelaide job
item.description: The former Port Adelaide boss made a cheeky reference to his former club after being unveiled as Tasmania’s first coach.

item.title: Leapmotor B10 gets bigger battery, 800V tech and more range
item.description: The brand’s best-seller in Australia has been given more power, bigger batteries and longer range overseas, but hasn't yet been locked in for local showrooms.

item.title: Football world turns on Argentina for ‘disgusting behaviour’ after World Cup defeat to Spain
item.description: Lionel Messi is his team’s only player who hasn’t been slammed for ‘embarrassing’ post-match antics.

item.title: Taylor Walker admits players are ‘confused’ as Crows fail to overturn Darcy Fogarty ban
item.description: The in-form forward will miss the next three matches.

item.title: Tayla Broad: Former Love Island star announces pregnancy with AFL hero Nathan Broad after fertility struggles
item.description: ‘My heart goes out to everyone on their own journey right now.’

item.title: Mother of Australian soldier killed in Ukraine urges others to take up the fight: ‘These people need help’
item.description: Two years after dealing with the unimaginable heartbreak of the death of her child, Cassandra Parker has changed her mind about Australians going to fight.

item.title: Woman killed in horror Sunshine Coast house fire identified
item.description: The woman is believed to have been showering when she realised her home was on fire.

item.title: Dragons make call on new coach with Dean Young given two-year deal
item.description: The club great beat out the challenge of his former teammate to secure the top job.

item.title: Queensland family welcomes ‘one-in-15-million’ identical quadruplets
item.description: The naturally conceived birth is so rare doctors believe it may be an Australian first.

item.title: Denza Z9 S electric sedan revealed as smaller sibling to Australia-bound Z9 GT
item.description: Denza's Z9 GT is scheduled to arrive in local showrooms later this year, but a shorter version unveiled in China could also be offered in Australia.

item.title: AFL issues heavy fine to Giants star Lachie Ash for misconduct towards umpire Jordyn Pearson
item.description: The league elevated the penalty after the player lost his cool at a female umpire.

item.title: Queensland businesses offered up to $16,000 to hire apprentices as construction worker shortage continues
item.description: There’s even more money in it if the people hired are over 21, women, veterans, Aboriginal or a Torres Strait Islander, or living with a disability.

item.title: Violent confrontation erupts at Woolworths supermarket where man allegedly harassed woman and her children
item.description: Frustration has boiled over in a country supermarket.

item.title: Glasgow braces for green and gold invasion as Aussie athletes arrive
item.description: The first Aussie athletes have arrived as officials get creative to make them feel at home.

item.title: Outgoing GWS Giants boss Dave Matthews raises eyebrows with controversial comment about Tasmania
item.description: ‘He’s working on the 20th licence while putting down the prospects of playing for the 19th licence.’

item.title: Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister, King Charles invites new Labour leader Andy Burnham to form government
item.description: Andy Burnham is set to become Britain’s seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Thailand police stop Australian man for alleged breach while riding skateboard on public road
item.description: It comes amid a warning about safety on the tourist hotspot’s congested streets.

item.title: Former Newcastle Knights player Scott Dureau dies aged 39 after lengthy health battle
item.description: The talented halfback spent four years in Australia before becoming an ‘icon’ in the Super League.

item.title: Perth couple caught up in mid-air drama over Middle East says plane nose dived, passengers were on edge
item.description: ‘You look out the window, there’s two ships on fire and you’ve just done three nose dives.’

item.title: Caroline Wilson fires back at Essendon great Tim Watson over James Hird ‘hate’ accusation
item.description: The veteran journalist has slammed the ‘mean and ridiculous commentary’ from a Bombers great.

item.title: Pauline Hanson boasts about one of the worst attendance records in Parliament
item.description: Official records reveal the One Nation leader has missed the equivalent of one full year of parliamentary sittings.

item.title: Court hears of 'unspeakable loss' after Paul Davy murdered by Luke Willcockson in dispute over dog
item.description: ‘I still cook for him.’

item.title: Dozens of couples accuse Ballarat photographer Justine Missen of skimping on wedding packages
item.description: Almost 20 couples say they haven’t got what they paid for.

item.title: The Open 2026: Report claims Bryson DeChambeau wanted Donald Trump's help in rules drama
item.description: The American was handed a two-shot penalty during the second round.

item.title: Family of allegedly murdered Australian woman Meaghan Bowler fight to bring children home
item.description: ‘Meaghan can no longer fight for her children, so we will fight for her.’
